nodes.name: subtask_01_Move_the_Mug_to_the_CoffeeMachine
preconds: Robot is not holding the mug.
Robot is not at the mug location.
Mug is at the dining table.
Robot is in the kitchen.
effects: Mug is at the coffee machine.
Robot is not holding the mug.

nodes.name: subtask_02_Move_the_Fork_to_the_Drawer
preconds: Robot is not holding the fork.
Robot is not at the fork's location.
Robot is at the kitchen.
Drawer is on the floor.
effects: Robot is close to the drawer.

nodes.name: subtask_03_Move_the_Spoon_to_the_Drawer
preconds: Robot is not holding the spoon.
Robot is not at the spoon's location.
Robot is at the kitchen.
Spoon is on the dining table.
Drawer is on the floor.
Robot is close to the drawer.
effects: Robot is close to the drawer.
Robot is not holding the spoon.

nodes.name: subtask_04_Move_the_Lettuce_to_the_Fridge
preconds: Robot is not holding the lettuce.
Robot is not at the lettuce location.
Fridge is initially closed.
effects: Robot is not holding the lettuce.

nodes.name: subtask_05_Move_the_Tomato_to_the_Fridge
preconds: Robot is not in action.
Robot is in the kitchen.
Tomato is on the dining table.
Fridge is closed.
effects: Robot is not holding the tomato.

nodes.name: subtask_06_Move_the_Toaster_to_the_CounterTop
preconds: Robot is not in action
Robot is at the kitchen
Toaster is on the dining table
Countertop is on the floor
Robot is not holding the toaster
effects: Robot is not holding the toaster
